{% extends "layouts/main-external.html" %} {% set activeNavigation = "View licences" %} {% set licence = data['licences'][data.ID] %} {% set pageName="Contact details"%} {% block containerStart %} {{ govukBackLink({ text: "Back to licence", href: "/external/licence" }) }} {% endblock %} {% block content %}
Abstraction licence {{ licence.number }}

{{ pageName }}

Licence holder

{# Get address for licence holder #} {% set contactAddress = "" %} {% for customer in data.customers %} {% if customer.name == licence.holder %} {% set contactAddress = customer.address1 + "
" + customer.city + "
" + customer.postcode %} {% endif %} {% endfor %} {# Licence holder #} {{ govukSummaryList({ rows: [ { key: { text: "Name" }, value: { text: licence.holder } }, { key: { text: "Address" }, value: { html: contactAddress } } ] }) }}

Returns to

{% set returnsContacts = [] %} {% for contact in data.contacts %} {% set hasReturnsNotice = false %} {% for customerEntry in contact.customers %} {% if customerEntry.customer == licence.holder %} {% for notice in customerEntry.notices %} {% if notice.type == "Returns by email" %} {% set hasReturnsNotice = true %} {% endif %} {% endfor %} {% endif %} {% endfor %} {% if hasReturnsNotice %} {% set returnsContacts = returnsContacts | push(contact) %} {% endif %} {% endfor %} {% if returnsContacts | length %} {% set returnsRows = [] %} {% for contact in returnsContacts %} {% set contactAddressForRow = contact.post if contact.post else contactAddress %} {% set returnsRows = returnsRows | push({ key: { text: "Name" }, value: { text: contact.name } }) %} {% if contact.email %} {% set returnsRows = returnsRows | push({ key: { text: "Email" }, value: { html: "" + contact.email + "" } }) %} {% endif %} {% if contact.phone %} {% set returnsRows = returnsRows | push({ key: { text: "Phone" }, value: { text: contact.phone } }) %} {% endif %} {% set returnsRows = returnsRows | push({ key: { text: "Address" }, value: { html: contactAddressForRow } }) %} {% endfor %} {# Returns #} {{ govukSummaryList({ rows: returnsRows }) }} {% else %} {{ govukSummaryList({ rows: [ { key: { text: "Name" }, value: { text: licence.holder } }, { key: { text: "Address" }, value: { html: contactAddress } } ] }) }} {% endif %}

Licence contact

{% set licenceContacts = [] %} {% for contact in data.contacts %} {% set isLicenceContact = false %} {% for customerEntry in contact.customers %} {% if customerEntry.customer == licence.holder and customerEntry.role == "Contact" %} {% set isLicenceContact = true %} {% endif %} {% endfor %} {% if isLicenceContact %} {% set licenceContacts = licenceContacts | push(contact) %} {% endif %} {% endfor %} {% if licenceContacts | length %} {# Debug: licenceContacts found - {{ licenceContacts | length }} #} {% set licenceRows = [] %} {% for contact in licenceContacts %} {% set contactAddressForRow = contact.post if contact.post else contactAddress %} {% set licenceRows = licenceRows | push({ key: { text: "Name" }, value: { text: contact.name } }) %} {% if contact.email %} {% set licenceRows = licenceRows | push({ key: { text: "Email" }, value: { html: "" + contact.email + "" } }) %} {% endif %} {% if contact.phone %} {% set licenceRows = licenceRows | push({ key: { text: "Phone" }, value: { text: contact.phone } }) %} {% endif %} {% set licenceRows = licenceRows | push({ key: { text: "Address" }, value: { html: contactAddressForRow } }) %} {% endfor %} {# Contacts #} {{ govukSummaryList({ rows: licenceRows }) }} {% else %}

No licence contacts

{% endif %}
